inputs.label: Body Length (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Length measured from shoulder to base of tail.

businessContext_i18n.en: Length measured from shoulder to base of tail.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Omuzdan kuyruk dibine kadar ölçülen uzunluk.
businessContext_i18n.de: Länge gemessen von Schulter bis Schwanzansatz.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Longueur mesurée de l'épaule à la base de la queue.
businessContext_i18n.es: Longitud medida desde el hombro hasta la base de la cola.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الطول المقاس من الكتف إلى قاعدة الذيل.

inputs.label: Chest circumference (cm)
inputs.businessContext: Girth measured just behind the front legs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Girth measured just behind the front legs.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ön bacakların hemen arkasından alınan çevre ölçüsü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Brustumfang gemessen direkt hinter den Vorderbeinen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Circonférence mesurée juste derrière les pattes avant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Circunferencia torácica medida justo detrás de las patas delanteras.
businessContext_i18n.ar: محيط الصدر المقاس خلف الأرجل الأمامية مباشرة.

inputs.label: Yaş (Ay)
inputs.businessContext: Age of the pet in months. If less than 12 months, a growth factor is applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the pet in months. If less than 12 months, a growth factor is applied.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Evcil hayvanın ay cinsinden yaşı. 12 aydan küçükse büyüme faktörü uygulanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter des Haustiers in Monaten. Bei unter 12 Monaten wird ein Wachstumsfaktor angewendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Âge de l'animal en mois. Si moins de 12 mois, un facteur de croissance est appliqué.
businessContext_i18n.es: Edad de la mascota en meses. Si es menor de 12 meses, se aplica un factor de crecimiento.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عمر الحيوان الأليف بالأشهر. إذا كان أقل من 12 شهرًا، يُطبق عامل النمو.

inputs.label: Condition Factor (1-5)
inputs.businessContext: Body condition score: 1 very thin, 3 ideal, 5 obese. Weight is adjusted accordingly.

businessContext_i18n.en: Body condition score: 1 very thin, 3 ideal, 5 obese. Weight is adjusted accordingly.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vücut kondisyon skoru: 1 çok zayıf, 3 ideal, 5 obez. Ağırlık buna göre ayarlanır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Körperkonditionswert: 1 sehr dünn, 3 ideal, 5 fettleibig. Das Gewicht wird entsprechend angepasst.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score de condition corporelle : 1 très maigre, 3 idéal, 5 obèse. Le poids est ajusté en conséquence.
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación de condición corporal: 1 muy delgado, 3 ideal, 5 obeso. El peso se ajusta en consecuencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: درجة حالة الجسم: 1 نحيف جدًا، 3 مثالي، 5 سمين. يتم ضبط الوزن وفقًا لذلك.

breakdown: 'İdeal kondisyon skoru 3 için tahmini ağırlık: ' + targetWeight.toFixed(1) + ' kg'
